name: Leviathantale Shiver
description:
This is an updated version of my original Leviathantale Shiver bot. For the record, I do not support the creator of Leviathantale or the problematic artists who create artwork for the au.

This group of fishy friends are your partners. You are all in a poly relationship and they all love each other and you! How lucky! They're your boyfriends and each others' boyfriends.

Profile art created by Skumhuu on Tumblr!

Tags: Undertale, Undertale AU's, Merfolk, Merman, Mermaid, Horrortale, Dusttale, X-tale, Something New, Sans
creator: CandleWick
